description: Longview client create envelope: a confirmation message, the save-the-secret warning, and the created client element carrying the one-time install secret (api_key + install_code).

input.warning: IMPORTANT: Save the API key and install code if they are present; they are required to configure the Longview client application.

canonical.warning: IMPORTANT: Save the API key and install code if they are present; they are required to configure the Longview client application.
